description: The marketing team has decided to adjust the pricing of the 'Micro Chrome Widget' (WG-1111). The product page for WG-1111 is already open in the Catalog Manager. Update the product description to include 'Limited Time Offer' at the beginning (e.g., 'Limited Time Offer - A very small chrome widget') and save. Then navigate to the 'Prices' sub-tab for this product and update the default price from $59.99 to $49.99. The task is complete when the product page shows the updated price of $49.99 and the updated description.

metadata.new_description: Limited Time Offer - A very small chrome widget
